message:
🌱 Add emissary-ingress: Allow ambassador Helm chart to use CRDS when namespaced  mission (#1328)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,84 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "emissary-ingress-1576-allow-ambassador-helm-chart-to-use-crds-when-namespaced",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "emissary-ingress: Allow ambassador Helm chart to use CRDS when namespaced ",
+    "description": "Allow ambassador Helm chart to use CRDS when namespaced . Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "deploy",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current emissary-ingress deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your emissary-ingress version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n emissary-ingress -l app.kubernetes.io/name=emissary-ingress\nhelm list -n emissary-ingress 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working emissary-ingress installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review emissary-ingress configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant emissary-ingress configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n emissary-ingress -l app.kubernetes.io/name=emissary-ingress\nkubectl get configmap -n emissary-ingress -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=emissary-ingress\n```\nI have a ambassador instance deployed as a namespaced resource and get the following \n\n```\n2019-05-29 08:34:51 kubewatch [32 TMainThread] 0.70.1 DEBUG: looking up ID for namespace god-default\n2019-05-29 08:34:51 kubewatch [32 TMainThread] 0.70.1"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Allow ambassador Helm chart to use CRDS when namespaced ",
+        "description": "So here's the issue: suppose that you have a new Ambassador user who sets up a bunch of stuff with CRDs but doesn't quite get it right. If they forget to create the CRD types at all, that's not so bad: Kubernetes won't let them `kubectl apply` the CRDs and they'll see that something is wrong.\n\nIf\n```yaml\n2019-05-29 08:34:51 kubewatch [32 TMainThread] 0.70.1 DEBUG: looking up ID for namespace god-default\n2019-05-29 08:34:51 kubewatch [32 TMainThread] 0.70.1 DEBUG: CRD type definition unreadable for authservices.getambassador.io: Forbidden\n2019-05-29 08:34:51 kubewatch [32 TMainThread] 0.70.1 DEBUG: CRD type definition unreadable for mappings.getambassador.io: Forbidden\n2019-05-29 08:34:51 kubewatch [32 TMainThread] 0.70.1 DEBUG: CRD type definition unreadable for modules.getambassador.io: Forbidden\n2019-05-29 08:34:51 kubewatch [32 TMainThread] 0.70.1 DEBUG: CRD type definition unreadable for r\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade emissary-ingress to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade emissary-ingress:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade emissary-ingress emissary-ingress/emissary-ingress --namespace emissary-ingress\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n emissary-ingress\nhelm list -n emissary-ingress\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n emissary-ingress -l app.kubernetes.io/name=emissary-ingress\nkubectl get events -n emissary-ingress --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Allow ambassador Helm chart to use CRDS when namespaced \" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "So here's the issue: suppose that you have a new Ambassador user who sets up a bunch of stuff with CRDs but doesn't quite get it right. If they forget to create the CRD types at all, that's not so bad: Kubernetes won't let them `kubectl apply` the CRDs and they'll see that something is wrong.\n\nIf they get RBAC wrong, though, that's much more annoying.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "2019-05-29 08:34:51 kubewatch [32 TMainThread] 0.70.1 DEBUG: looking up ID for namespace god-default\n2019-05-29 08:34:51 kubewatch [32 TMainThread] 0.70.1 DEBUG: CRD type definition unreadable for authservices.getambassador.io: Forbidden\n2019-05-29 08:34:51 kubewatch [32 TMainThread] 0.70.1 DEBUG: CRD type definition unreadable for mappings.getambassador.io: Forbidden\n2019-05-29 08:34:51 kubewatch [32 TMainThread] 0.70.1 DEBUG: CRD type definition unreadable for modules.getambassador.io: Forbidden\n2019-05-29 08:34:51 kubewatch [32 TMainThread] 0.70.1 DEBUG: CRD type definition unreadable for ratelimitservices.getambassador.io: Forbidden\n2019-05-29 08:34:51 kubewatch [32 TMainThread] 0.70.1 DEBUG: CRD type definition unreadable for tcpmappings.getambassador.io: Forbidden\n2019-05-29 08:34:51",
+        "helm list\n\nNAME         \tREVISION\tUPDATED                 \tSTATUS  \tCHART              \tAPP VERSION\tNAMESPACE        \nambassador   \t1       \tSat May 25 16:34:36 2019\tDEPLOYED\tambassador-2.6.1   \t0.70.1     \tambassador",
+        "kubectl get crd\n\nNAME                                 CREATED AT\nauthservices.getambassador.io        2019-05-25T20:34:36Z\nmappings.getambassador.io            2019-05-25T20:34:36Z\nmodules.getambassador.io             2019-05-25T20:34:36Z\nratelimitservices.getambassador.io   2019-05-25T20:34:36Z\ntcpmappings.getambassador.io         2019-05-25T20:34:36Z\ntlscontexts.getambassador.io         2019-05-25T20:34:36Z\ntracingservices.getambassador.io     2019-05-25T20:34:36Z"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "emissary-ingress",
+      "incubating",
+      "networking",
+      "deploy"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "emissary-ingress"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Namespace",
+      "Clusterrole"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "deploy"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/emissary-ingress/emissary/issues/1576",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/emissary-ingress/emissary"
+    },
+    "reactions": 1,
+    "comments": 21,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with emissary-ingress installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-17T06:29:07.374Z",
